svg.text: Raised among battlefield shrines, Seraphine collects the names of the fallen

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: and carries them as vows. Her public profile shows what the party may know;

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: private confessions stay hidden from share links.
